feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Question about report for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition - Out of the box reports or CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for Sales LOB reports that they wanted to have a report that shows the product cost price which is maintained on the material master level and also the sales price of a material. I tried to look up out of the box reports given by SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for Sales, couldn't actually find one and also tried to look for the standard CDS Views but couldn't find one specific to what client ASK is.

Experts out there please provide some guidance on the above.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: Restrict Remit To field in BN Invoice
entry.content:
My client utilises SAP Business Network & SAP Ariba SLP. They have encountered situations where their suppliers are updating their banking details in the Remit ID on the Business Network instead of in their SLP profile.

Is there a way to restrict these fields in BN?

Or Is there a way to map the remit to information in BN to update in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud?

SAP Business Network for Procurement and SAP Business Network for Supply Chain SAP Business Network for Suppliers SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Ariba to SAP S4HANA Cloud Integration Supplier Masterdata Standard Field Mapping
entry.content:
Hello!

We have a requirements to provide standard field mapping for supplier masterdata from Ariba to S4HANA Cloud. Do we have any documentation or anything for this item?

Thank you!

entry.title: Customization of Sales Order screen based on material type in cloud (SAP ABAP).
entry.content:
Hii Community,

How do I customize the sales order screen based on the material type given . I have created some custom fields out of which some are related to type "A" and some are related to type "B". I need to make sales order screen such that Custom Fields related to Type "A" should appear when a particular Material Type is selected and similarly for Type "B" . 

Thanks

Shraddha yak

entry.title: material plan price API
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We need to enter plan price to materials as mass upload. We tried to find API but couldn't find. Do you know any API for entering  plan price or standard screen as mass upload ?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: How to check if a note is applied in S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to access a tile in Fiori Launchpad similar to the SNOTE transaction to check if a note is applied in S4HANA Public Cloud?

Regards,

Jonathan

entry.title: Unable to add the event filters in the Event Enablement Channel
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been trying to add the filters in the event channel in S4HANA Public Cloud but the add filter option isn't available for the outbound topic we have created.

Can someone help us is it with the role issue? Or those outbound topics doesn't have the filters to setup, providing the screenshot FYR

 

Thanks

Sandeep

entry.title: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type automatically update into a Z Amount Field.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a Z condition type and I would like to know how to aggregate value in the header level which should be update automatically in the header of a rebate Z condition type.  However our aggregation has been achieved in the header level in standard way, unfortunately presently we aren't able to automatic update in the Header rebate condition type Zcustom. Currently it's not updated in the amount field.

Thank you.

entry.title: Question about notification in SAPS/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for example, when the new products are being added into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how would the customer be notified they have to add the price to the added materials and also the sales price to it?

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales MM (Materials Management) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

entry.title: CDS View in ABAP Development Environment Eclipse is showing authorizationerror in test system Public
entry.content:
Dear expert,

We have created a CDS view in the ABAP Development Environment eclipse and deployed the same in our SAP Public Cloud 2402 development system, it is working fine in the development system but as we move to the test system it is showing the error in the screenshot below.

Please guide us.

entry.title: Clearance by virtual account of summary invoices
entry.content:
I would like to match a customer with a virtual account number for a summary invoice, which is a Japan-specific requirement, and make a Clearance.

1) We would like to know where to find the virtual account number on the bank statements.

2) Is it sufficient to set the virtual account number only in the BP master and the virtual account management application (F2089)?

entry.title: No authorization to create tasklist for plant (general maintenance)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am facing this issue in the Create Task List app.

When the user is going to create task list, receive the error message: "No authorization to create tasklist for plant XXXX"

I´ve check Maintain Workforce and Maintain Business User apps and they seem to be ok.

Any ideas?

Thanks so much in advanced.

entry.title: What is the CDS view to display plant address in the billing document printout
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Please help me to know what is the CDS view to display plant address in the billing document printout?

entry.title: Collective processing of PR's generated by MRP in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to find the best solution for processing purchasing requisitions that were generated by MRP run. I'm working on S4 Hana Public Cloud 2402.

So, let's say MRP run was executed and this is the Stock/requirement list:

 

On 02/04/2024 there is a shortage of 2,401 KG, but the date of first PR is on 12/04/2024. I'm aware I can change the delivery dates in Monitor Material Coverage, but what if I have similar situation for multiple materials with multiple purchase requisition proposals? This would mean that production planner would have to do change dates on every requisition one by one which is a lot of manual work.

In the app Process Purchase Requisitions (v2) only date which is available is Delivery date:

 

This means that purchasing department cannot see exact Availability date (Date required for production) and they can only trust that planner has edited the dates accordingly. 

My general question is - what is the best way to collectively process purchase requisitions generated by MRP?Besides Process Purchase requisitions (V2) there is no other app that offers collective processing (conversion to PO's).

This whole process means that users have to use two apps simultaneously (monitor material coverage + process purchase requisitions).

Thank you.

SRM External Requirements  SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud  MAN Material Requirements Planning

entry.title: JOB in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to update Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

     We have a requirement to update Custom Business Object every week based on some custom logic in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. Our approach is to create a CBO, and schedule a Job in Public Cloud that runs a repository to create new table entries in CBO. We configured Custom Application Job using Custom Job Application Template created on top of Custom Application Job Log Catalog entry in which custom Class with required interface signature is used.

      However, the issue we are facing is while trying to create entries in CBO from the custom class. Couldn't find any repositories to create/update entries of CBO from the custom class (as all our custom classes are set with ABAP on Cloud flag since it is Public Cloud). We could only find released classes from SAP to read CBO data but not to update CBO. 

       Any inputs/help from experts in this area is highly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Raja Sekhar K

entry.title: Material determination - Requirement in SAP Cloud public
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if it is possible to add a requirement (logic?) to the material determination procedure in the cloud public solution.

Indeed, I would like to be able to peform the substitution only if the material is not available (shortage). 

If you have any remarks or solutions, please let me know.

Regards,
Nicolas.

entry.title: Post currency adjustments
entry.content:
Dear colleagues, 

While testing Chapter 4.39 Post currency adjustments (F1606) of the test script J58 (for Germany) I encountered a problem. The test script advised to use USD as foreign transaction currency in the header. In the line items the script advised to use the account 11010000 and 22000000. For account 11010000 I used the F4 Help to find a house bank and house bank account. But finally I cannot post due to the error message "Page 1 Line Item 1:Transaction curr. USD differ from house bank curr. EUR posting not allowed". 

How can I solve this issue? Thank you in advance!  S. Zhou

entry.title: How to send email in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public on creation of Purchase order to approve
entry.content:
Hi

I am looking for a solution to implement Auto email send to approver once Purchase Order created/Modified in SAP S/4 Hana Cloud system.

Please share if anything help me in this

 

#sap S4HANA  #Email Send

entry.title: Add "Start Date" & "End Date" fields in Customer Statement Form
entry.content:
Hello all, 

In "Customer Statement" form, we need to add "Start Date" and "End Date" as fields in the table that contain Open Items on the item level, and since the fields are not available in Standard form, we have to add custom fields. Can you please tell us which Business Context we have to use to add these custom fields in Customer Statement form ? Could you please tell us which is the appropriate BADI to use to determine the "Start Date" & "End Date" information ?

Many Thanks,

entry.title: Sales Organizational Structure - Ad Service Industry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about the Sales Organizational Structure for Service industry.

Customer is an Ad service company who reach customers via Instagram, Facebook. Also, they say have 500+ dispensaries. They couldn't understand the SAP terms how more specific we explain.

Could somebody give examples how this Sales Organizational Structure works for a Ad service company?

How to explain them to make this understand.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks!
